task: Add TODO details and pass criteria for using Datalox MCP to generate trajectory rows as soon as possible without mixing legacy note/skill product loops.
summary: Added Step 0 under Trajectory Export Product Alignment for an MCP-first record_trajectory path that lets agents produce DebuggingTrajectoryV1 rows quickly and separately from legacy note/skill promotion.
observations: TODO.md now prioritizes Datalox MCP as the first-class trajectory generation surface.
Step 0 defines a dedicated record_trajectory MCP tool with repo_path plus one DebuggingTrajectoryV1 row object as input.
The planned tool writes payload.trajectoryRow events and explicitly does not call promote_gap, compileRecordedEvent, note generation, or skill generation.
Pass criteria include dirty worktree support, blocked-row recording, invalid-row no-write behavior, no skill/note mutation, and a three-row synthetic MCP smoke test.

outcome: Updated TODO.md only. Verified the inserted Step 0 section by reading it back and searching for the new record_trajectory criteria. No build or test suite was run because this was a TODO-only edit in an already dirty repo.
